---
format: html
title: "HTTP 404: Not Found"
---

<div id="random-404">Definitely not here.</div>

<script>
  const messages = [
    "This page went out for coffee and never came back.",
    "You’ve reached the edge of the internet. Please turn around.",
    "The link you followed is on a break. Indefinitely.",
    "The page exists in another timeline.",
    "We looked everywhere - under the cache, behind the cookies - no luck.",
    "This URL was abducted by rogue semicolons.",
    "Congrats, you found nothing. It’s surprisingly hard.",
    "The content you seek has been optimized out.",
    "The server insists it was here a minute ago.",
    "That route is not in the router’s routing table."
  ];

  const el = document.getElementById("random-404");
  const msg = messages[Math.floor(Math.random() * messages.length)];
  el.innerHTML = `<p>${msg}</p>`;
</script>

<p><em>Try the button below to return to safety.</em></p>

[back_to_home();](/){.btn .btn-danger}
